title: alstonia deplanchei var. deplanchei
intro: Alstonia deplanchei var. deplanchei, also known as the white cheesewood or white satinwood, is a plant species native to New Caledonia, belonging to the Apocynaceae family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities, making it a potential treatment for various health conditions. The health benefits of Alstonia deplanchei var. deplanchei include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. In traditional medicine, the plant is prepared as a decoction or infusion, often in combination with other herbs, to treat a range of ailments, including fever, cough, and skin conditions.
